name: Product Discovery
description: A research and planning team that explores market opportunities, validates ideas, defines requirements, designs user experiences, and structures delivery into actionable sprints.

agents.role: Leads product discovery, defines the product vision, and aligns stakeholders on strategic direction
Conducts market research, competitive analysis, and user interviews to inform product decisions
Translates research findings into detailed requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria
Creates prototypes and interaction designs to visualize and validate proposed user experiences
Organizes validated features into sprint backlogs with estimated effort and clear delivery milestones
